isolation.scope: local app routes only; no destructive data mutations

assertions.title: Landing page loads at / for unauthenticated users

steps.observed: Landing rendered with hero, marketing copy, and CTA links

steps.action: Inspect landing page sections and feature cards
steps.expected: Hero, Features (>=6 cards), How it works, CTA section present
steps.observed: All required sections detected; 6 feature items detected (AI Writing Tools, Content Library, Smart Calendar, Video Studio, Social Publishing, Analytics)

steps.action: Click primary Get Started CTA on landing
Click Sign In link on landing

evidence.consoleErrors: Login route emits Missing NEXT_PUBLIC_INSFORGE_URL or NEXT_PUBLIC_INSFORGE_ANON_KEY (does not change URL-target assertion result)

steps.expected: No horizontal scroll; readable stacked layout; tappable CTAs
steps.observed: documentScrollWidth equals viewport width (390); hasHorizontalOverflow=false; CTA heights are >=44px for mobile CTA elements

evidence.consoleErrors: none on landing route after clear

steps.action: Inspect computed styles on landing heading/body
steps.expected: Heading uses Syne; body uses Space Grotesk; warm light background

evidence.consoleErrors: none on landing route after clear

assertions.title: Login page respects ?mode=signup query parameter

steps.expected: Signup form rendered immediately with Name field and Create account button
steps.observed: Route loads but UI remains Loading/error state; no inputs detected; Name/Create account not present

assertions.issues: Blocked by missing NEXT_PUBLIC_INSFORGE_URL/NEXT_PUBLIC_INSFORGE_ANON_KEY in active dev-server environment; cannot validate signup-form rendering contract

assertions.title: Auth gates all protected routes

steps.observed: 10 routes redirected to /login; /video-studio stayed at /video-studio and returned 404
/ returned 200 with landing UI; /login returned 200 but emits runtime env errors

assertions.issues: Assertion failed because /video-studio is not auth-gated (404 instead of redirect to /login). Public /login route also has runtime env errors in current setup.

frictions.description: Multiple 'Get Started' CTA elements caused strict-locator click ambiguity.
frictions.resolution: Used explicit selector a[href='/login?mode=signup'] for deterministic CTA targeting.

frictions.description: agent-browser network request listing did not return request history during this run.
frictions.resolution: Captured HTTP status/redirect evidence via curl against localhost routes.

frictions.description: Login route emits missing InsForge env runtime errors in current dev server, preventing auth-form rendering checks.

blockers.description: Active dev-server environment is missing NEXT_PUBLIC_INSFORGE_URL or NEXT_PUBLIC_INSFORGE_ANON_KEY, causing login page runtime errors.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Retried direct navigation and page reloads; error persisted on each /login load.

summary: Tested 7 assertions: 5 passed, 1 failed (VAL-CROSS-006), 1 blocked (VAL-FIX-002 due missing env vars).
